summary: Tested photo gallery redesign (Facebook-style photo reel). Backend API /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos/all returns photos with both url and thumbnail_url fields correctly. Frontend gallery modal opens when clicking contact avatar, shows thumbnail grid with type badges, full-screen viewer with swipe, photo counter badge '1 of N', Grid button, and Set as Profile Photo button (for non-profile photos).

backend_photos_all_endpoint.details: Returns 11 photos for contact 69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34 with url and thumbnail_url fields

photo_gallery_modal_opens.details: Clicking contact avatar opens the gallery modal

gallery_grid_with_thumbnails.details: Shows 11 photos in thumbnail grid view with type badges (PROFILE, CONGRATS, BIRTHDAY)

full_screen_swipeable_viewer.details: Tapping a grid tile opens full-screen viewer with horizontal FlatList

photo_counter_badge.details: Shows '1 of 11' counter at top of full-screen viewer

grid_button.details: Grid button visible at bottom bar, clicking navigates back to thumbnail grid

set_as_profile_button.details: Set as Profile button appears for non-profile photos (not visible when viewing profile photo itself)

contact_page_loads_correctly.details: Contact page loads with Forest Ward name and avatar visible

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery tiles in TouchableOpacity don't expose data-testid to DOM in React Native Web - causes Playwright selectors like [data-testid^='gallery-tile-'] to not find elements. Consider adding testID to the parent View or using nativeID for web accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo gallery redesign tested successfully. Backend API returns 11 photos with both url and thumbnail_url fields. Frontend gallery modal shows thumbnail grid with type badges (PROFILE, CONGRATS, BIRTHDAY), full-screen swipeable viewer with photo counter '1 of N', Grid button to return to grid, and Set as Profile Photo button for non-profile photos. All features working as expected.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered
